msgs.text:
I treated the 58 prior turns as a research log, not as proof. The prompt fixes the special tame-format submission: first generators sigma,tau, implicit tame relation tau^sigma=tau^2, later generators in the pro-2 core, and exponents reduced modulo M=85667662080.The only candidate not refuted in the prior log is still the dynamic tame-inertia word:variables sigma,tau,x,y definitions nx = (x*tau^50932630783)^40491355905 ny = (y*tau)^40491355905 relations x*sigma^45176306175*x*sigma^40491355905*x^-1*nx*ny^sigma*y^-1

Equivalently, with ПҖ=ПҖ2вҲҲZ and О·=2ПҖ on odd tame inertia,r=xПғвҲ’ПҖxПғПҖxвҲ’1(xП„вҲ’О·)ПҖ ((yП„)ПҖ)ПғyвҲ’1,with ПҖвүЎ40491355905,вҲ’ПҖвүЎ45176306175,вҲ’О·вүЎ50932630783(modM).The late prior turns also correctly reframed the remaining obstruction: after candidate-side normalization, H1(P,L2H) classifies arithmetic-minus-candidate differences, not raw coordinates of the candidate alone. In particular, candidate residuals vanish if the affine origin is taken from the candidateвҖҷs own actual quadratic slice qact; only the arithmetic-minus-candidate class can still refute or confirm the word.New contribution this turn: anti-cyclotomic reduction of the first mixed IA obstructionLetО”e,f=вҹЁПғЛү,П„ЛүвҲЈП„Лүe=1,ПғЛүf=1,ПғЛүП„ЛүПғЛүвҲ’1=П„Лү2вҹ©,where e is odd and eвҲЈ2fвҲ’1. Write f=2n even. The prior log identifies the first marked IA difference space after odd-Hall rigidity asAe,fвүғH1(P,L2H),with two universal square directions b[2],S[2]and mixed commutator directions indexed by involutionsОҙj=П„ЛүjПғЛүn,j(1+2n)вүЎ0(mode).

This gives gcd(e,2n+1) mixed directions, matching the prior formuladimAe,f=2+gcd(e,2f/2+1)for even f.The new reduction is that these mixed directions depend only on the anti-cyclotomic part d=gcd(e,2n+1),not on the whole tame inertia order e.

Indeed, write e=deвҲ’. Since eвҲЈ(2nвҲ’1)(2n+1) and dвҲЈ2n+1, the remaining factor eвҲ’divides 2nвҲ’1. Also gcd(d,eвҲ’)=1, since 2nвҲ’1 and 2n+1 are coprime odd numbers.

The involution condition is j(1+2n)вүЎ0(mode).

Because eвҲ’вҲЈ2nвҲ’1, and gcd(eвҲ’,1+2n)=1, this forcesj=eвҲ’u,uвҲҲZ/dZ.

Thus the set of involution indices in О”e,f is canonically the same as the index set for О”d,f, up to multiplication by the unit eвҲ’вҲҲ(Z/dZ)Г—.

Now compare the commutator directionZj=hвҲҲHeвҲ‘[Xh,XhОҙj]with its image in the quotient О”d,f. The fibers of HeвҶ’Hd have odd size eвҲ’, so over F2 summing over the fiber does not change the class. The index j=eвҲ’u maps to eвҲ’umodd, and multiplication by eвҲ’is a permutation of Z/dZ. Hence the mixed Zj -directions for (e,f) are exactly the pullback of the mixed directions for (d,f).

So the first IA difference space splits asAe,fвү…вҹЁb[2],S[2]вҹ©вҠ•Ad,fanti,d=gcd(e,2f/2+1),where Ad,fanti is the involution-indexed mixed part already visible in the quotient О”d,f.This has two useful consequences.First, for fixed even f, the maximal first-IA mixed test is not arbitrary eвҲЈ2fвҲ’1, buteanti=2f/2+1.Every other e-case factors through its anti-cyclotomic divisor dвҲЈeanti. Thus (e,f)=(5,4) is not just a convenient test; it is the full anti-cyclotomic first-IA test for f=4. For (e,f)=(91,12), the first IA mixed obstruction only sees d=gcd(91,26+1)=gcd(91,65)=13,so the extra factor 7вҲЈ26вҲ’1 contributes only cohomologically free, first-IA-invisible tame inertia.Second, the Frobenius-lift gauge becomes cleaner. ReplacingПғЛүbyП„ЛүkПғЛү sends jвҶҰj+k(2nвҲ’1).

On the anti-cyclotomic subgroup, 2n вүЎвҲ’1, so this is jвҶҰjвҲ’2k.Since d is odd, multiplication by вҲ’2 is a unit; the gauge action is simply transitive on the d mixed directions. Therefore an arithmetic comparison should never attach intrinsic meaning to a named basis vector Z0 until the same Frobenius lift is fixed on both sides.

Consequence for the next arithmetic comparison

The late prior turns propose testing (e,f)=(5,4) withL=Q2(О¶5,П–),П–5=2,and Frobenius lift Пғ(П–)=П–. That remains the right next test, but the result above explains why: (5,4) is the full first-IA anti-cyclotomic quotient for f=4, so its five involution directions are not a random sample. They are the entire mixed first-IA obstruction for that unramified 2-primary period.The precise target is still not a candidate-side coordinate computation. It is the arithmetic-minus-candidate class[mbarithвҲ’Оҳ0cand]вҲҲH1(P,L2H),using the same H-equivariant b-lift and the candidateвҖҷs actual qact -slice. Prior turns already observed that candidate-side residuals vanish in this affine normalization; the remaining question is whether arithmetic lands at the same affine origin.

ESTABLISHED: The dynamic candidate remains the only unrefuted candidate. I proved a new anti-cyclotomic reduction for the first marked IA obstruction: for f=2n, the mixed involution-indexed directions for О”e,f depend only on d=gcd(e,2n+1),and are pulled back from О”d,f. Thus the 2nвҲ’1 part of tame inertia is first-IA-free. In particular, (5,4) is the full anti-cyclotomic first-IA test for f=4, while (91,12) reduces at this layer to d=13.

GAP: This is still not a proof of the presentation of GQ2. The missing ingredient is an arithmetic comparison or dyadic formation theorem showing that the actual local Galois action has the same filtered affine origins as the candidate over every finite tame subextension.

NEXT: For (e,f)=(5,4), compute the arithmetic-minus-candidate class in the seven-dimensional first IA space: two square directions plus the five anti-cyclotomic involution directions. The target is zero in the candidate-normalized torsor.[BREAKTHROUGH]
